name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Shield your eyes in style with our polarized UV400 sunglasses. Featuring a lightweight acetate frame and scratch-resistant lenses, these are the perfect companion for beach days, hikes, and city strolls. Blocks 100% of UVA and UVB rays.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Lightweight, non-greasy SPF 50 broad-spectrum sunscreen that protects against UVA and UVB rays. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes. Infused with aloe vera and vitamin E for extra skin nourishment. Dermatologist tested.

name: Tropical Beach Dress
description: Flow freely in this breezy tropical print dress made from 100% organic cotton. Features adjustable spaghetti straps, a relaxed fit, and a midi length perfect for the beach or boardwalk. Available in multiple vibrant prints.

name: Foldable Beach Umbrella
description: Stay cool and protected with this heavy-duty foldable beach umbrella. UV-coating blocks 95% of UV rays. Features a sand anchor base, tilt mechanism, and carry bag. Opens to 7 feet wide for maximum shade coverage.

name: Wide Brim Sun Hat
description: Protect your face and neck from harsh summer sun with this stylish wide-brim hat. Crafted from natural straw with a moisture-wicking interior band. Packable and lightweight — perfect for travel. UPF 50+ protection.

name: Insulated Water Bottle
description: Keep your drinks ice-cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 with our double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel bottle. BPA-free, leak-proof lid, and fits most cup holders. Available in 500ml and 1L sizes.

name: Aloe Vera Gel Moisturizer
description: A soothing aloe vera gel moisturizer that hydrates and calms sun-exposed skin. Lightweight formula absorbs quickly without leaving a sticky residue. Perfect for daily skincare and after-sun care.

name: Summer Linen Shirt
description: Stay cool and stylish with this breathable linen shirt. Designed with a relaxed fit and soft fabric, making it perfect for hot summer days. Easy to pair with shorts or jeans.

name: Beach Flip Flops
description: Comfortable and durable flip flops designed for beach and casual wear. Features a soft sole and anti-slip grip for maximum comfort during long summer walks.

name: Minimalist Gold Necklace
description: A simple yet elegant gold-plated necklace that adds a subtle shine to any outfit. Lightweight and perfect for everyday wear or layering with other accessories.

name: Electrolyte Drink Mix
description: Stay hydrated with this refreshing electrolyte drink mix. Packed with essential minerals to replenish your body after workouts or long days in the sun. Just mix with water and enjoy.
